slides.eyebrow: Matimu ya Ntangha wa 4 - Xiyenge xa le Xikarhi
slides.title: Ku Dyondza eka Varhangeri
slides.lead: Hlangana ni varhangeri va mune lava nga ni xivindzi, u kuma mikhuva leyinene leyi va nga hi dyondzisaka yona.

media.alt: Swifaniso swa mune swa mihlovo yo hambana swi yime swin'we ehansi ka dyambu leri vangamaka.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 320 180' role='img'><rect width='320' height='180' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='130' width='320' height='50' fill='#c8b89a'/><circle cx='270' cy='42' r='24' fill='#e8a13a'/><g><circle cx='70' cy='78' r='14' fill='#8a1f1f'/><rect x='60' y='94' width='20' height='40' rx='4' fill='#8a1f1f'/><circle cx='120' cy='72' r='14' fill='#2f5233'/><rect x='110' y='88' width='20' height='46' rx='4' fill='#2f5233'/><circle cx='170' cy='78' r='14' fill='#3f6b9b'/><rect x='160' y='94' width='20' height='40' rx='4' fill='#3f6b9b'/><circle cx='220' cy='72' r='14' fill='#7a5a3a'/><rect x='210' y='88' width='20' height='46' rx='4' fill='#7a5a3a'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: Amukela ntlawa hi mbilu leyinene. Byela swichudeni leswaku namuntlha va ta hlangana ni varhangeri va mune va ntiyiso va matimu. Hlamusela leswaku a hi dyondzi ntsena leswi varhangeri va swi endleke - hi dyondza mikhuva leyinene leyi va yi kombiseke, tanihi ku lulama, xivindzi ni musa. Vutisa: i mani murhangeri loyi u n'wi tivaka? Mudyondzisi, mutolovoti (coach), kumbe mutswari?

slides.title: Xana murhangeri i yini?
slides.lead: Murhangeri i munhu la pfunaka vanhu van'wana naswona a va kombisa ndlela leyinene yo famba ha yona.

blocks.text: **Murhangeri** i munhu loyi vanhu van'wana va hlawulaka ku n'wi landzela. Varhangeri lavanene a hi vafambisi ntsena. Va khathala hi vanhu van'wana naswona va ringeta ku endla leswi nga **swo lulama** ni leswi **lulameke**.

items: Varhangeri lavanene va yingisela van'wana naswona va khoma un'wana un'wana hi ndlela leyi fanaka.
Va ni xivindzi naswona va yimela leswi lulameke, hambiloko swi tika.
Hi nga dyondza **mikhuva** leyinene eka vona, tanihi vutshembeki, musa ni ntshembo.

slides.notes: Tirhisa ririmi leri twisisekaka eka Ntangha wa 4. Hlamusela rito 'mikhuva' hi ku olova: mikhuva i swilo leswinene leswi hi swi pfumelaka naswona hi ringetaka ku swi endla. Tsala marito ya mikhuva ya nga ri mangani ebodweni (ku lulama, xivindzi, musa, ntshembo). Swichudeni va ta vona mikhuva leyi eka murhangeri un'wana ni un'wana namuntlha.

slides.title: Nelson Mandela
slides.lead: Mufana wa le makaya loyi a kuleke a ta rhangela Afrika-Dzonga hinkwayo.

blocks.text: **Nelson Mandela** u velekiwile hi 1918 emutini lowutsongo wa Eastern Cape. Ndyangu wa yena a wu n'wi vitana *Rolihlahla*. Tanihi wanuna u tirhile ku endla leswaku Afrika-Dzonga yi lulamela vanhu **hinkwavo**, ku nga khathariseki nhlovo wa nhlonge ya vona.

items: Khale, Afrika-Dzonga a yi ri ni milawu leyo ka yi nga lulamanga leyi a yi khoma vanhu hi ku hambana hi ku ya hi mihlovo ya vona.
Mandela u yimelane ni milawu leyi yo ka yi nga lulamanga.
U vekiwile ekhotsweni malembe ya 27, kambe a nga tshikanga ntshembo.

media.alt: Xifaniso xo rhula xa wanuna la n'wayitelaka la nga ni misisi yo basa (grey).
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 180 180' role='img'><rect width='180' height='180' fill='#f4efe6'/><circle cx='90' cy='96' r='60' fill='#dcd3c2'/><circle cx='90' cy='82' r='34' fill='#7a5a3a'/><path d='M56 78 a34 34 0 0 1 68 0 q-34 -22 -68 0 Z' fill='#e6e1d8'/><path d='M62 118 q28 26 56 0 v40 h-56 Z' fill='#3f6b9b'/></svg>

slides.notes: Hlamusela apartheid hi vunene ni hi ku olova eka swichudeni leswitsongo: khale, milawu leyo ka yi nga lulamanga yi hambanise vanhu hi nhlovo wa nhlonge ya vona naswona a yi nga lulamanga. U nga ngheni eka vuxokoxoko byo tika. Kongomisa eka ku tiyimisela ni ntshembo wa Mandela. Malembe ya 27 ekhotsweni ma kombisa leswaku a a khathala swinene.

slides.eyebrow: Leswi Mandela a hi dyondzisaka swona
slides.title: Ku rivalela ni ku lulama
slides.lead: Loko Mandela a huma ekhotsweni, u hlawurile ku rhula ematshan'wini ya vukarhi.

blocks.text: Nkarhi hinkwawo swi vonaka onge a swi koteki ku kondza swi endliwa.

Hi 1994 Afrika-Dzonga yi khome nhlawulo wa yona wo sungula laha **un'wana ni un'wana** a a ta kota ku vhota. Mandela u ve presidente wa hina wo sungula la hlawuriweke hi ndlela ya xidemokrasi. U kombele vanhu ku **rivalela** ni ku tirhisana.

items: Nkhuva: **ku rivalela** - ku tshika vukarhi leswaku ku vumbiwa ku rhula.
Nkhuva: **ku lulama** - un'wana ni un'wana u fanele ku khomiwa hi ndlela leyi fanaka.
Nkhuva: **ntshembo** - ku pfumela leswaku swilo swi nga antswa.

slides.notes: Leyi i mbilu ya ntsheketo wa Mandela eka Ntangha wa 4: a a ta va a hlundzukile endzhaku ka khotso, kambe u hlawurile ku rivalela ni ku rhula. Vutisa swichudeni: u tshame u rivalela munghana rini? Swi ku titwise njhani? Fambisa nkhuva lowu eka vutomi bya vona.

slides.title: Mahatma Gandhi
slides.lead: Murhangeri loyi a kombiseke leswaku u nga yimela leswi lulameke u nga lwi.

blocks.text: **Mohandas Gandhi** u tile eAfrika-Dzonga a huma eIndiya hi 1893 ku ta tirha tanihi gqwetha (lawyer). Laha u khomiwe hi ndlela yo ka yi nga lulamanga hikuva a a ri Muindiya. Leswi swi n'wi endle a boha ku lwisana ni milawu leyo ka yi nga lulamanga - kambe hi ndlela ya **ku rhula**.

items: Gandhi u dyondzise vanhu ku kaneta **handle ka madzolonga**. U vitanile leswi *satyagraha*, leswi vulaka 'matimba ya ntiyiso'.
Vanhu va landzele xikombiso xa yena naswona va ala ku yingisa milawu leyo ka yi nga lulamanga.
Endzhakunyana u tlhelele eIndiya naswona u pfune ku rhangela tiko ra yena eku ntshunxekeni. Vo tala va n'wi vitana *Mahatma*, leswi vulaka 'moya lowukulu'.

media.alt: Xifaniso xo olova lexi nga ni tigilazi to rhendzeleka ni nhonga yo famba ha yona.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 180 180' role='img'><rect width='180' height='180' fill='#f4efe6'/><circle cx='90' cy='96' r='60' fill='#dcd3c2'/><circle cx='90' cy='78' r='30' fill='#c9a37a'/><circle cx='80' cy='76' r='7' fill='none' stroke='#3a3a3a' stroke-width='2'/><circle cx='100' cy='76' r='7' fill='none' stroke='#3a3a3a' stroke-width='2'/><line x1='87' y1='76' x2='93' y2='76' stroke='#3a3a3a' stroke-width='2'/><path d='M64 112 q26 22 52 0 v44 h-52 Z' fill='#f0ece3'/><line x1='128' y1='96' x2='128' y2='156' stroke='#7a5a3a' stroke-width='4'/></svg>

slides.notes: Hlamusela satyagraha hi ku olova tanihi 'matimba ya ntiyiso' kumbe 'ku kaneta hi ku rhula'. Mianakanyo ya nkoka eka Ntangha wa 4: Gandhi u kombisile leswaku u nga tiya u tlhela u va ni xivindzi u nga vavisi munhu. Xiya leswaku mianakanyo ya ku rhula ya Gandhi endzhaku yi hlohlotele Mandela ni varhangeri van'wana emisaveni hinkwayo.

slides.eyebrow: Leswi Gandhi a hi dyondzisaka swona
slides.title: Ntiyiso ni ku rhula
slides.lead: Gandhi u pfumele leswaku nchumu wa matimba swinene lowu u nga wu endlaka i ku tshama u rhurile naswona u tshembekile.

blocks.heading: Ntiyiso
blocks.text: Tshama u tshembekile, hambiloko swi tika.

blocks.heading: Ku rhula
blocks.text: Lulamisa swiphiqo u nga vavisi van'wana.

blocks.heading: Xivindzi
blocks.text: Va ni xivindzi xo ringanela ku yimela leswi lulameke.

slides.notes: Tirhisa tikhadi tinharhu tanihi tinhlokomhaka to vulavula ha tona. Kombela swichudeni swikombiso swa le kholweni: hi nga lulamisa njhani mholovo hi ku rhula exikolweni? Hi nga vula njhani ntiyiso hambiloko hi chava? Swi hlayise swi ri swa matirhelo naswona swi ri kusuhi ni misava ya vona.

slides.title: Chief Albert Luthuli
slides.lead: Mudyondzisi ni hosi loyi a rhangeleke hi ku rhula ni ku miyela.

blocks.text: **Albert Luthuli** a a ri mudyondzisi wa xikolo na hosi ya Xizulu. U ve murhangeri wa African National Congress (ANC), ntlawa lowu a wu tirhela timfanelo to lulama ta vanhu hinkwavo va Afrika-Dzonga. Ku fana na Gandhi, u pfumele eka ku kaneta hi **ku rhula**.

items: Hi 1960 u kume **Nobel Peace Prize** - hakelo leyi dumeke swinene ya vanhu lava tirhelaka ku rhula.
A a ri munhu wo sungula wa Muafrika ku tshama a kuma hakelo leyi.
U dyondzise vanhu ku va ni ku lehisa mbilu, ku rhula ni xivindzi.

media.alt: Menite ya nsuku ya hakelo ya ku rhula leyi nga ni ribini.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 180 180' role='img'><rect width='180' height='180' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M76 40 l-18 44 h20 l12 -40 Z' fill='#8a1f1f'/><path d='M104 40 l18 44 h-20 l-12 -40 Z' fill='#3f6b9b'/><circle cx='90' cy='112' r='40' fill='#e8a13a'/><circle cx='90' cy='112' r='30' fill='#f0c467'/><path d='M90 92 l6 18 h19 l-15 11 6 18 -16 -11 -16 11 6 -18 -15 -11 h19 Z' fill='#b9821f'/></svg>

slides.notes: Kongomisa eka Luthuli tanihi murhangeri wo rhula loyi a xiximiweke emisaveni hinkwayo. Hlamusela Nobel Peace Prize hi ku olova: hakelo yo hlawuleka ya vanhu lava pfunaka ku tisa ku rhula. Ku va munhu wo sungula wa Muafrika ku yi kuma hi 1960 swi kombisa leswaku misava yi xiximile ndlela ya yena ya ku rhula. Fambisa mikhuva ya yena eka ku kaneta hi ku rhula ka Gandhi.

slides.title: Walter Sisulu
slides.lead: Murhangeri wo tlhariha na wo tshembeka loyi a kongomiseke a tlhela a seketela van'wana.

blocks.text: **Walter Sisulu** a a ri munghana wa le kusuhi na mupfuni wa Nelson Mandela. A a tiviwa hi ku va **wo tlhariha** ni hi ku nyika switsundzuxo swinene. U tirhe hi matimba leswaku vanhu hinkwavo va Afrika-Dzonga va khomiwa hi ku lulama.

items: U pfune varhangeri lavantshwa, ku katsa na Mandela, ku kula ni ku rhangela.
Ku fana na Mandela, u rhumeriwe ekhotsweni hikwalaho ko yimelana ni milawu leyo ka yi nga lulamanga.
A nga tshikanga ku pfumela eka Afrika-Dzonga leyi lulameke na leyi ntshunxekeke.

media.alt: Swifaniso swimbirhi swi yime etlhelo ka swin'wana, xin'we xi veke voko ehlanini ka lexin'wana.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 200 180' role='img'><rect width='200' height='180' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='140' width='200' height='40' fill='#c8b89a'/><circle cx='70' cy='60' r='20' fill='#7a5a3a'/><rect x='54' y='82' width='32' height='58' rx='6' fill='#2f5233'/><circle cx='130' cy='60' r='20' fill='#7a5a3a'/><rect x='114' y='82' width='32' height='58' rx='6' fill='#3f6b9b'/><rect x='84' y='90' width='34' height='9' rx='4' fill='#2f5233'/></svg>

slides.notes: Sisulu u dyondzisa nkhuva wa ku tshembeka, vutlhari ni ku seketela van'wana - murhangeri a nga fanelanga a va munhu la dumeke swinene leswaku a va wa nkoka. Hlamusela leswaku Sisulu u pfune a tlhela a letela Mandela. Vutisa swichudeni: i mani la ku pfunaka ni ku ku seketela? Va nga pfuna ni ku seketela njhani munghana?

slides.title: Mikhuva leyi varhangeri va hina va yi averaka
slides.lead: Varhangeri va mune vo hambana, kambe va ni mikhuva leyinene yo tala leyi fanaka.

blocks.heading: Ku lulama
blocks.text: Mandela a a lava leswaku un'wana ni un'wana a khomiwa hi ndlela leyi fanaka.

blocks.heading: Ku rhula
blocks.text: Gandhi na Luthuli va hlawurile ku rhula, ku nga ri madzolonga.

blocks.heading: Xivindzi
blocks.text: Hinkwavo va mune a va ri ni xivindzi, hambiloko swi ri ni khombo.

blocks.heading: Musa
blocks.text: Sisulu u seketele a tlhela a pfuna vanhu lava a a va rhendzele.

slides.notes: Xitlheledzo lexi xi hlanganisa varhangeri va mune. Kombisa leswaku hambileswi va hanyeke minkarhi ni tindhawu to hambana, va averile mikhuva. Vutisa swichudeni leswaku i nkhuva wihi lowu va ehleketaka leswaku i wa nkoka swinene naswona ha yini. A ku na nhlamulo yo hoxa - hlohlotela mbulavurisano.

slides.title: Riendzo hi ku hundza ka nkarhi

events.label: Luthuli u kuma Nobel Peace Prize
Mandela u va presidente; un'wana ni un'wana a nga vhota

slides.notes: Pfuna swichudeni ku hlaya xikombiso xa nkarhi (timeline) xo olova ku suka evuximeni ku ya exineneni. Kombisa leswaku varhangeri lava va hanyile minkarhi yo hambana, naswona vutomi bya van'wana byi tshame byi pfangetana. Xiya leswaku malembe a ma landzelelananga hi ku kongoma laha hi vomu - u nga kombela swichudeni ku pfuna ku ma veka hi nxaxamelo lowunene tanihi ntirho wo hatlisa.

slides.title: Ku va murhangeri evutomini bya wena
slides.lead: A wu fanelanga u dumile leswaku u va murhangeri lonene.

blocks.text: U nga kombisa mikhuva leyinene leyi fanaka ni ya varhangeri lava **siku ni siku** ekaya, exikolweni ni ni vanghana va wena.

items: Va **wo lulama** - avela naswona u nyika un'wana ni un'wana nkarhi wa yena.
Va ni **musa** - pfuna munhu la nga eka maxangu.
Va ni **xivindzi** - yimela munghana la khomiwaka hi ndlela yo biha.
Va **wo tshembeka** - tshama u vula ntiyiso.

media.alt: Xifaniso xa n'wana la pfunaka n'wana un'wana ku pfuka, ku ni mbilu ehenhla ka vona.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='124' width='220' height='36' fill='#c8b89a'/><circle cx='80' cy='60' r='16' fill='#3f6b9b'/><rect x='68' y='78' width='24' height='46' rx='6' fill='#3f6b9b'/><circle cx='140' cy='72' r='16' fill='#2f5233'/><rect x='128' y='90' width='24' height='34' rx='6' fill='#2f5233'/><rect x='92' y='92' width='36' height='9' rx='4' fill='#3f6b9b'/><path d='M110 24 a9 9 0 0 1 16 0 a9 9 0 0 1 16 0 q0 12 -16 22 q-16 -10 -16 -22 Z' fill='#8a1f1f'/></svg>

slides.notes: Tisa dyondzo eka vutomi bya swichudeni. Leyi i xikongomelo xa CAPS: ku dyondza mikhuva eka varhangeri ni ku yi tirhisa. Kombela xichudeni xin'wana ni xin'wana ku boxa nchumu wun'we lowu va nga ta wu endla vhiki leri ku kombisa nkhuva lowunene. U nga hundzula leswi ku va 'khumbi ra mikhuva' ra le kholweni.

slides.eyebrow: A hi kambeleni leswi hi swi dyondzeke
slides.title: Kambela u tlhela u tsundzuka
slides.lead: Hlamula swivutiso leswi ku kombisa leswi u swi dyondzeke hi varhangeri va hina.

blocks.text: Namuntlha hi hlangane ni varhangeri va mune va nga ni xivindzi - **Nelson Mandela**, **Mahatma Gandhi**, **Chief Albert Luthuli** na **Walter Sisulu** - ni mikhuva leyinene leyi va hi dyondzisaka yona.

blocks.question: Boxa varhangeri vambirhi lava u dyondzeke ha vona namuntlha ni nkhuva wun'we lowu un'wana ni un'wana a hi dyondzisaka wona.
Gandhi na Luthuli havambirhi va pfumele eka ndlela yin'we yo hlawuleka yo yimela leswi lulameke. A ku ri yini?
Tsala hi nkhuva wun'we lowu wu humaka eka dyondzo leyi ni ndlela leyi u nga wu kombisaka ha yona exikolweni vhiki leri.

slides.notes: Tirhisa swivutiso leswinharhu tanihi ntirho wo tsariwa kumbe mbulavurisano wa le kholweni. Xivutiso xo sungula xi kambela ku tsundzuka, xivutiso xa vumbirhi xi kambela ku twisisa (ku kaneta hi ku rhula / ku pfumala madzolonga), naswona xivutiso xa vunharhu xi kombela swichudeni ku tirhisa nkhuva eka vutomi bya vona, leswi fambelanaka ni xikongomelo xa CAPS. Dzunisa matshalatshala naswona tsundzuxa swichudeni leswaku un'wana ni un'wana a nga va murhangeri lonene hi ku hanya mikhuva leyinene.
